criteria.text: GET /api/calendar returns 200 with { today, week }; events carry subject,start,end,location,attendees(response)
Zoneless Graph times read as UTC, rendered in America/New_York; today grouping matches practice local day
Not-connected/rejected Microsoft session -> 401 not_authenticated; UI returns to login, never blank 200
Calendar read records audit entry (method path -> status, ms); no bodies, no event subjects/attendees
Error on calendar path logs path/status references only; never subjects, attendee emails, or PHI
